---
format:
    dashboard:
        theme: flatly
        scrolling: false
        css: styles.css
---


```{r, pakkar}
library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(plotly)
library(zoo)
```

```{r, data og annað}
data_ls <- read_rds("full_data.rds")

# Litir
vr_litir <- c("#00305c", "#028fbc", "#eec215", "#d64550", "#4fb94f", "#7d5ba6", "#e07b39", "#3a8e8e")
valuebox_litir <- c("#2E7D6E", "#E57373", "#F9A825")

adal_litur  <- vr_litir[1]
trend_litur <- vr_litir[4]

# Date
date_back_year     <- floor_date(today(), "year") - months(12)
date_from_max_back <- year(today()) - 4
date_from_x <- "2020-01-01"
# Texti

```

```{r, hjalparfoll}

vr_layout <- function(plot, title_x = NULL, textposition = NULL, tooltip = "all", tooltip_percent = FALSE, font_size = 16) {
  p <- plotly::ggplotly(plot, tooltip = tooltip) |>
    plotly::layout(
      legend = list(
        title = list(text = ""),
        orientation = "h",
        y = -0.2,
        x = 0.5,
        xanchor = "center"
      )
    )
  if (!is.null(font_size)) {
    font <- list(size = font_size)
    p <- plotly::layout(p, font = font, legend = list(font = font))
    # Update all axes (xaxis, xaxis2, xaxis3, ... created by facets)
    ax_names <- grep("^[xy]axis", names(p$x$layout), value = TRUE)
    for (ax in ax_names) {
      p$x$layout[[ax]]$tickfont <- font
      p$x$layout[[ax]]$titlefont <- font
    }
    if (!is.null(p$x$layout$annotations)) {
      for (i in seq_along(p$x$layout$annotations)) {
        p$x$layout$annotations[[i]]$font$size <- font_size
      }
    }
  }
  # Format numbers in default tooltip
  if (identical(tooltip, "all")) {
    fmt_one <- function(t) {
      if (is.na(t) || !nzchar(t)) return(t)
      # Match decimal numbers that are NOT dates (dates look like 2025-01-15)
      # Target: numbers with a decimal point preceded by ": " or standalone
      m <- gregexpr("-?[0-9]*\\.[0-9]{3,}", t, perl = TRUE)
      regmatches(t, m) <- lapply(regmatches(t, m), function(nums) {
        vals <- as.numeric(nums)
        if (tooltip_percent) {
          sprintf("%.2f%%", vals * 100)
        } else {
          sprintf("%.2f", vals)
        }
      })
      t
    }
    for (i in seq_along(p$x$data)) {
      tt <- p$x$data[[i]]$text
      if (!is.null(tt)) {
        p$x$data[[i]]$text <- vapply(tt, fmt_one, character(1), USE.NAMES = FALSE)
      }
    }
  }
  if (!is.null(textposition)) {
    text_traces <- which(sapply(p$x$data, function(tr) {
      !is.null(tr$mode) && grepl("text", tr$mode)
    }))
    if (length(text_traces) > 0) {
      for (i in seq_along(text_traces)) {
        pos <- textposition[min(i, length(textposition))]
        p <- plotly::style(p, textposition = pos, traces = text_traces[i])
      }
    }
  }
  if (!is.null(title_x)) {
    title_text <- if (is.null(plot$labels$title)) "" else plot$labels$title

    # ggplotly often stores the ggplot title as an annotation anchored to "paper".
    # Remove that annotation and set a real Plotly layout title anchored to container.
    if (!is.null(p$x$layout$annotations) && nzchar(title_text)) {
      p$x$layout$annotations <- Filter(function(ann) {
        ann_text <- if (is.null(ann$text)) "" else as.character(ann$text)
        is_title_text <- grepl(title_text, ann_text, fixed = TRUE)
        is_top_noarrow <- isFALSE(ann$showarrow) && !is.null(ann$y) && isTRUE(ann$y > 1)
        !(is_title_text || is_top_noarrow)
      }, p$x$layout$annotations)
    }

    p <- plotly::layout(
      p,
      title = list(
        text = title_text,
        x = title_x,
        xanchor = "left",
        xref = "container"
      )
    )
  }
  p
}

```


# Þjóðhagsreikningar

```{r, macro_data}
macro_data_ls <- data_ls$macro
```

## Row

```{r, gdp_components}
gdp_comp_use <- c("Einkaneysla", "Samneysla", "Fjárfesting alls", "Innflutningur", "Útflutningur", "Verg Landsframleiðsla")

p1 <- macro_data_ls$gdp_comp |> 
  filter(skipting %in% gdp_comp_use) |> 
  arrange(date, skipting) |> 
  group_by(skipting) |> 
  mutate(
    delta = value / lag(value, 4) - 1,
    skipting = factor(skipting, levels = gdp_comp_use),
    tooltip_text = glue::glue(
    "{skipting}\n",
    "Dags: {format(date, '%Y-%m')}\n",
    "Breyting: {scales::percent(delta, accuracy = 0.1)}"
    )
    ) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  drop_na() |> 
  filter(year(date) >= date_from_max_back) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, delta, text = tooltip_text)) + 
  geom_col(fill = adal_litur) + 
  facet_wrap(~ skipting) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL
    #subtitle = "Innflutningur kemur til frádráttar í landsframleiðslu"
  )

vr_layout(p1, tooltip = "text")
  # layout(
  #   title = list(
  #     text = "Innflutningur kemur til frádráttar í landsframleiðslu",
  #     font = list(size = 14),
  #     x = 0,
  #     xanchor = "left"
  #   )
  # )
```


```{r, gdp_per_cap}
p2 <- macro_data_ls$gdp_per_cap |> 
  # filter(year(date) >= date_from_max_back) |> 
  # group_by(skipting) |> 
  # mutate(index = index / index[1] * 100) |> 
  # ungroup() |> 

  ggplot(aes(date, index, col = skipting)) + 
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Einkaneysla og landsframleiðsla á mann"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = vr_litir)
  
vr_layout(p2)
```


## Row

```{r, hagvoxtur}
p3 <- macro_data_ls$gdp_per_cap |> 
  filter(str_detect(skipting, "Verg")) |> 
  mutate(
    "gdp_gr_per_cap" = index / lag(index, 4) - 1
  ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, gdp_gr_per_cap)) +
  geom_col(fill = adal_litur) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Hagvöxtur á mann"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent)

vr_layout(p3, tooltip_percent = TRUE)
```


```{r, Viðskiptajöfnuður}
p4 <- macro_data_ls$vidskiptajofnudur |>
  mutate(trend = rollapplyr(hlutfall, width = 4, FUN = mean, partial = TRUE)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, hlutfall)) +
  geom_line(col = adal_litur) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = trend), col = trend_litur) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Viðskiptajöfnuður (hlutfall af landsframleiðslu)\nRauða línan sýnir meðaltal seinustu fjóra ársfjórðunga"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(label = percent)

vr_layout(p4, tooltip_percent = TRUE)
```


# Vinnumarkaðurinn

```{r, vinnumarkadur_data}
vinnumarkadur_ls <- data_ls$vinnumarkadurinn
```

## Row

```{r, hlutfall_starfandi}
p5 <- vinnumarkadur_ls$starfandi |> 
  mutate(trend = rollapplyr(hlutfall_starfandi, width = 12, FUN = mean, partial = TRUE)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, hlutfall_starfandi)) + 
  geom_line(col = adal_litur) +
  geom_line(aes(y = trend), col = trend_litur) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Hlutfall starfandi"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent)

vr_layout(p5, tooltip_percent = TRUE)
```


```{r, atvinnuleysi}
p6 <- vinnumarkadur_ls$atvinnuleysi |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  rename("Atvinnuleysi" = "atvinnuleysi") |> 
  left_join(vinnumarkadur_ls$atvinnuleysi_langtima |> rename("Langtíma atvinnuleysi" = "atvinnuleysi")) |> 
  drop_na() |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -date) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, value, col = name)) + 
  geom_line() + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = vr_litir) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Atvinnuleysi og langtíma atvinnuleysi (12 mánuðir og lengur)"
  )

vr_layout(p6, tooltip_percent = TRUE)
```

## Row

```{r, auglyst_storf}
# auglýst störf og vinnulitlir
auglyst_storf_tbl <- vinnumarkadur_ls$laus_storf |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  mutate(hlutfall = laus_storf / fjoldi_starfa) |> 
  select(-c(laus_storf, fjoldi_starfa))

p7 <- auglyst_storf_tbl |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, hlutfall)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Laus störf sem hlutfall af heildarfjölda starfa"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent)

vr_layout(p7, tooltip_percent = TRUE)

```


```{r, vinnulitlir}
# Hlutastörf
hlutastorf_tbl <- vinnumarkadur_ls$vinnulitlir

p8 <- hlutastorf_tbl |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, hlutfall, col = eining)) + 
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Vinnulitlir"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) +
  scale_color_manual(values = vr_litir) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

vr_layout(p8, tooltip_percent = TRUE)
```


```{r, framleidni}
# þarf ekki trend, er að nota prodt
p9 <- vinnumarkadur_ls$framleidni |> 
  mutate(
    #trend = rollapplyr(prod, width = 4, FUN = mean, partial = TRUE),
    delta = prodt / lag(prodt, 4) - 1
    ) |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, delta)) +
  geom_col(fill = adal_litur) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Þróun á framleiðni vinnuafls\nBreyting m.v. sama ársfjórðungi árið á undan (4ra mánaða hlaupandi meðaltal)"
  )

vr_layout(p9, tooltip_percent = TRUE)

```


# Laun

```{r, laun_data}
laun_ls <- data_ls$laun
```

## Row

```{r, launavisitala_hagstofu}
launavisitala_tbl <- laun_ls$launavisitala |>
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  mutate(date = floor_date(date, "quarter")) |> 
  group_by(date) |> 
  summarise(launavisitala = mean(launavisitala)) |> 
  mutate(Launavísitala = launavisitala / lag(launavisitala, 4) - 1) |> 
  drop_na() |> 
  select(-launavisitala)

radstofunartekjur_tbl <- laun_ls$radstofunartekjur |>
  mutate("Ráðstöfunartekjur" = value / lag(value, 4) - 1) |>
  drop_na() |> 
  select(-value)

p10 <- radstofunartekjur_tbl |> 
  left_join(launavisitala_tbl) |> 
  drop_na() |> 
  filter(date >= "2020-01-01") |>
  pivot_longer(cols = -date) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, value, fill = name)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = vr_litir) + 
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) + 
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Launavísitala Hagstofu og ráðstöfunartekjur, breyting frá sama tíma árið á undan"
  )

vr_layout(p10, tooltip_percent = TRUE)

```


```{r, laun_starfsstett}
p11 <- laun_ls$laun_starfsstett |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  group_by(starfsstett) |> 
  mutate(visitala = visitala / visitala[1] * 100) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, visitala, col = starfsstett)) + 
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Launaþróun eftir starfsstétt"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = vr_litir)

vr_layout(p11)
```


## Row

```{r, launþegahopar}
p12 <- laun_ls$laun_hopur |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  group_by(hopur) |> 
  mutate(visitala = visitala / visitala[1] * 100) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, visitala, col = hopur)) + 
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Launaþróun eftir launþegahóp",
    caption = "test"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = vr_litir)

vr_layout(p12)
```



```{r, starfsheiti}
p13 <- laun_ls$laun_atvinnugrein |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  group_by(atvinnugrein) |> 
  mutate(
    visitala = visitala / visitala[1] * 100,
    breyting = visitala / 100 - 1
    ) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(visitala = visitala / visitala[1] * 100) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, visitala, col = atvinnugrein)) + 
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Launaþróun eftir atvinnugrein"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = vr_litir)

vr_layout(p13)
```


# Húsnæðis- og leiguverð

```{r, husnaedi_data}
hus_ls <- data_ls$husnaedi
```

## Row

```{r, husnaedisver}
p14 <- hus_ls$kaupverd |> 
  mutate(
    name = 
      case_when(
        name == "visitala" ~ "Vísitala kaupverðs",
        name == "visitala_hofudborgarsvaedi" ~ "Höfuðborgarsvæðið",
        name == "visitala_landsbyggd" ~ "Landsbyggðin",
        name == "visitala_serbyli_hofudborgarsvaedi" ~ "Sérbýli á höfuðborgarsvæðinu",
        name == "visitala_fjolbyli_hofudborgarsvaedi" ~ "Fjölbýli á höfuðborgarsvæðinu",
        name == "visitala_serbyli_landsbyggd" ~ "Sérbýli landsbyggðin",
        TRUE ~ "Fjölbýli landsbyggðin"
      )
  ) |> 
  group_by(name) |> 
  mutate(value = value / value[1] * 100) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, value, col = name)) + 
  geom_line() + 
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Vísitala fasteignaverðs"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = vr_litir)

vr_layout(p14)
```



```{r, leiguverð}
p15 <- hus_ls$leiguverd |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, leiguverd)) + 
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Vísitala leiguverðs"
  )

vr_layout(p15)
```


## Row

```{r, typical_price}
p16 <- hus_ls$myigloo |> separate_wider_delim(cols = stadur, delim = " ", names = c("pnr", "stadur"), too_many = "merge") |> 
  filter(stadur %in% c("Reykjavík", "Hafnarfjörður", "Kópavogur", "Mosfellsbær", "Garðabær")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(stadur, verd, median), y = verd)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.6, color = "steelblue") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(big.mark = ".", decimal.mark = ",")) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Leiguverð eftir staðsetningu skv. MyIgloo á 80-120 fermetra íbúð"
    ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() 

vr_layout(p16)

```


# Fjármálamarkaðurinn

```{r, fjarmala_data}
finance_ls <- data_ls$fjarmal
```

## Row

```{r, hlutabrefaverd}
p17 <- finance_ls$stocks |> 
  arrange(date, name) |> 
  group_by(name) |> 
  mutate(value = value / value[1] * 100) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, value, col = name)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Hlutabréfamarkaðurinn: Ísland (OMXI15) vs. Bandaríkin (S&P 500)"
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = vr_litir)

vr_layout(p17)

```



```{r, skuldabref_krafa}
p18 <- finance_ls$krafa |>
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  set_names("date", "5 ára", "10 ára") |>
  pivot_longer(cols = -date) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, value, col = name)) + 
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(values = vr_litir) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Krafa á skuldabréfamarkaði til 5 og 10 ára"
  )

vr_layout(p18)
```


## Row

```{r, gengi}
p19 <- finance_ls$gengi |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, gengi)) + 
  geom_line(col = adal_litur) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Gengisvísitala krónunnar - Dagsgögn"
  )

vr_layout(p19)
```



```{r, commodities}
p20 <- finance_ls$commodities |>
  mutate(date = floor_date(date, "month")) |> 
  group_by(date, name) |>
  summarise(value = mean(value)) |>  
  ungroup() |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |>
  arrange(date, name) |>
  group_by(name) |> 
  mutate(value = value/value[1] * 100) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, value, col = name)) + 
  geom_line() + 
  theme_minimal() + 
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Hrávöruverð á heimsmarkaði"
  ) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = vr_litir)

vr_layout(p20)
```


# Ferðaþjónustan

```{r}
tourism_ls <- data_ls$tourism
```

## Row


```{r, ferdamenn}
p21 <- tourism_ls$ferdamenn |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  arrange(date, name) |> 
  group_by(name) |> 
  mutate(trend = rollapplyr(value, width = 12, FUN = mean, partial = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, value)) + 
  geom_line(col = adal_litur) +
  geom_line(aes(y = trend), col = trend_litur) +
  facet_wrap(~ name, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Fjöldiferðamanna í gegnum Keflavíkurflugvöll"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(label = number_format())

vr_layout(p21)
```


## Row

```{r, gistinaetur}
p22 <- tourism_ls$gistinaetur |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  mutate(fjoldi = as.numeric(fjoldi)) |> 
  arrange(date, rikisfang) |> 
  group_by(rikisfang) |> 
  mutate(trend = rollapplyr(fjoldi, width = 12, FUN = mean, partial = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, fjoldi)) +
  facet_wrap(~ rikisfang) + 
  geom_line(col = adal_litur) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = trend), col = trend_litur) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Gistinætur á hótelum"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(label = number_format())

vr_layout(p22)
```


```{r, kortavelta_erlend}
p23 <- tourism_ls$kortavelta_erlend |>
  arrange(date) |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |>
  mutate(trend = rollapplyr(value, width = 12, FUN = mean, partial =  TRUE)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, value)) + 
  geom_line(col = adal_litur) +
  geom_line(aes(y = trend), col = trend_litur) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Kortavelta erlendra ferðamanna"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(label = number_format())

vr_layout(p23)
```


# Mannfjöldi

## Row

```{r, mannfjoldi_data}
mannfjoldi_ls <- data_ls$mannfjoldi
```


```{r, aldurspyramidi}
p24 <- mannfjoldi_ls$aldurspyramidi |>
  ggplot(aes(x = aldur, y = fjoldi_plot, fill = kyn)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_grid(country ~ ar) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = \(x) scales::number(abs(x), big.mark = ".")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Karlar" = vr_litir[1], "Konur" = vr_litir[4])) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Fjöldi",
    fill = NULL,
    title = "Aldurspýramídi"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

vr_layout(p24)
```


```{r, adfluttir_umfram_brottflutta}
p25 <- mannfjoldi_ls$adfluttir_brottfluttir |>
  mutate(
    value_plot = if_else(event == "Brottfluttir", -abs(value), abs(value))
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = date)) +
  geom_col(
    data = \(df) filter(df, event != "Aðfluttir umfram brottflutta"),
    aes(y = value_plot, fill = event)
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = \(df) filter(df, event == "Aðfluttir umfram brottflutta"),
    aes(y = value, colour = event),
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~rikisfang) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Aðfluttir" = vr_litir[2], "Brottfluttir" = vr_litir[4])) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = c("Aðfluttir umfram brottflutta" = vr_litir[1])) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = \(x) scales::number(abs(x), big.mark = ".")) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Fjöldi",
    fill = NULL,
    colour = NULL,
    title = "Aðfluttir og brottfluttir eftir ríkisfangi"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

vr_layout(p25) |>
  (\(p) {
    seen <- character()
    for (i in seq_along(p$x$data)) {
      nm <- p$x$data[[i]]$name
      if (!is.null(nm)) {
        clean <- gsub("^\\((.+),\\d+\\)$", "\\1", nm)
        p$x$data[[i]]$name <- clean
        p$x$data[[i]]$legendgroup <- clean
        if (clean %in% seen) {
          p$x$data[[i]]$showlegend <- FALSE
        } else {
          seen <- c(seen, clean)
        }
      }
    }
    p
  })()
```


# Staða fyrirtækja

```{r, ft_data}
ft_ls <- data_ls$fyrirtaeki
```

## Row

```{r, tekjuskiptingaruppgjör}
p26 <- ft_ls$tekjuskiptingaruppgjor |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = - date) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, value)) + 
  geom_col(fill = adal_litur) +
  facet_wrap(~ name, scales = "free_y") + 
  theme_minimal() +
  #theme(plot.title = element_text(margin = margin(b = 15))) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Staða íslenskra fyrirtækja\nUpplýsingar úr tekjuskiptingaruppgjöri Hagstofu"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent)

vr_layout(p26, tooltip_percent = TRUE) |>
  plotly::layout(margin = list(t = 120))
```


# Staða fyrirtækja, frh.

## Row

```{r, gjaldthrot}
p27 <- ft_ls$gjaldthrot |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  mutate(trend = rollapplyr(fjoldi, width = 12, FUN = mean, partial = TRUE)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, fjoldi)) +
  geom_line(col = adal_litur) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = trend), col = trend_litur) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Gjaldþrot fyrirtækja með virkni á fyrra ári"
  ) 

vr_layout(p27)
```


```{r, nyskraningar}
p28 <- ft_ls$nyskraningar |> 
  filter(date >= date_from_x) |> 
  mutate(trend = rollapplyr(fjoldi, width = 12, FUN = mean, partial = TRUE)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, fjoldi)) +
  geom_line(col = adal_litur) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = trend), col = trend_litur) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Nýskráningar fyrirtækja"
  )

vr_layout(p28)
```


## Row

```{r, vaentingar_fyrirtaekja}
p29 <- ft_ls$vaentingar_fyrirtaekja |> 
  select(date, contains("v.")) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -date) |> 
  mutate(
    name = str_remove(name, "\\(v\\. ás\\)"),
    name = str_trim(name)
    ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, value, col = name)) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(values = vr_litir) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Vísitölur efnahagslífsins\nKönnun Gallup á viðhorfi 400 stærstu fyrirtækjum landsins"
  )

vr_layout(p29)
```


```{r, vaentingar_hlutfall}
p30 <- ft_ls$vaentingar_fyrirtaekja |> 
  select(date, contains("h.")) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = -date) |> 
  mutate(
    name = str_remove(name, "\\(h\\. ás\\)"),
    name = str_trim(name)
    ) |> 
  mutate(
    name = factor(name, levels = c(
      "Mjög góðar", "Góðar", 
      "Slæmar", "Mjög slæmar"
    ))
  ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, value, fill = name)) +
  geom_col(width = 120, col = "white") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = vr_litir) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "Vísitölur efnahagslífsins\nKönnun Gallup á viðhorfi 400 stærstu fyrirtækjum landsins"
  )

vr_layout(p30)
```
